company_name: 株式会社 キャリアパートナー
hunter_likelihood_reason: All jobs are temp staffing/dispatch (haken) roles: hotel cleaning, warehouse sorting, data entry, food manufacturing; no headhunting/recruiting signals
notes: No official website found despite checking MHLW, saiyo.page, baitoru.com, alarmbox.jp, gBizINFO, and Google search. Company operates as temp staffing/dispatch agency. gBizINFO and alarmbox.jp both confirm no registered corporate URL or contact email.
